overall.description: A first-person walk through an underground urban tunnel in a video game (Cyberpunk 2077). The camera moves steadily along a sidewalk as vehicles periodically pass by in the opposite direction. The environment features concrete pillars, fluorescent overhead lighting, and a visible exit at the far end.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view walking through an underground concrete tunnel. The environment is illuminated by overhead fluorescent lights with green accent strips along the left wall. Vehicles periodically pass by in the opposite direction on the multi-lane road, including a notable yellow sports car. The tunnel exit is visible as a small bright spot in the far distance.

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the approach toward the tunnel exit, with the bright daylight at the end of the tunnel becoming a dominant feature in the frame. The artificial lighting mixes with the natural light from the exit. Vehicles continue to pass periodically as the camera maintains a steady walking pace along the sidewalk.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk through a sterile underground tunnel that gradually transitions from artificial fluorescent lighting toward a bright daylight exit. It begins deep within the concrete corridor, moving past green accent strips and concrete pillars while a yellow sports car passes in the opposite direction. As the camera progresses forward, the tunnel exit grows larger in the frame and more vehicles, including a white van, stream past on the multi-lane road. The scene then shifts as the camera approaches the end of the tunnel, where the harsh overhead lights begin to mix with an intensifying glow of natural light. Finally, the bright daylight becomes the dominant feature of the frame as the steady walk continues toward the open air.
